description: Nuvei is a global payments technology company that provides payment acceptance, payouts, acquiring, risk, banking, orchestration, and related commerce infrastructure for businesses and platforms. Its public site and documentation focus on online payment integrations and merchant payment operations.
summary: Nuvei exposes a documented payments integration surface centered on its REST API plus browser/client integration layers (Web SDK and Simply Connect); no public GraphQL API, MCP server, CLI, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec was found.
